company.name: Power Grid Corporation of India Limited

insights.message: Good return on equity — ROE 16.8% in FY2025
High-margin business — Net Profit Margin 35.2% in FY2025
Profits are cash-backed — CFO/Net Profit ratio 2.33x in FY2025
Strong Free Cash Flow generation — 27.4% margin in FY2025
